org.description: The GitHub organization slug used in URLs (the part after github.com/).

after.description: Cursor for pagination (endCursor from previous page).

values.description: List GitHub Projects (v2) for an organization
Fetch metadata for a ProjectV2 by node ID

after.description: Cursor for pagination (endCursor from previous page).

values.description: List custom fields (columns) defined in a ProjectV2, including their data types and possible values. Use this to understand the project schema before querying items - e.g., to see what Status options exist, what custom fields are available (Priority, Sprint, etc.). Returns field metadata like SingleSelect options and Iteration configurations.

after.description: Cursor for pagination (endCursor from previous page).

values.description: List all work items (issues, pull requests, draft issues) in a ProjectV2 along with their custom field values. Returns the actual content of the project board - each item's title, status, assignees, labels, and values for all custom fields (Status, Priority, Sprint, etc.). Use this to see what tasks are in the project and their current state.
